Finding.CheckName: NSG All Inbound Traffic Open: web-nsg
Finding.Description: NSG 'web-nsg' allows ALL inbound TCP from Internet (0.0.0.0/0). Complete attack surface exposed.
Finding.Recommendation: Remove all-traffic rule. Specify only required ports.

Finding.CheckName: NSG Exposes Docker-API(2375) to Internet: docker-nsg
Finding.Description: Docker API port 2375 exposed to Internet. Full host compromise possible.
Finding.Recommendation: Close port 2375 immediately.

Finding.CheckName: Owner Role Assigned: owner-principal-abc123
Finding.Description: Principal 'owner-principal-abc123' has Owner role on the subscription. Owner can modify all security controls.
Finding.Recommendation: Replace Owner with least-privilege roles (Contributor/Reader).

Finding.CheckName: Storage Public Blob Access Enabled: prodstorageacct
Finding.Description: Storage account 'prodstorageacct' allows anonymous public blob access. Sensitive containers may be exposed.
Finding.Recommendation: Set allowBlobPublicAccess=false.

Finding.CheckName: Storage HTTP Traffic Allowed: backupstorage
Finding.Description: Storage account 'backupstorage' allows unencrypted HTTP connections.
Finding.Recommendation: Enable 'Secure transfer required'.

Finding.CheckName: VM OS Disk Not Encrypted: prod-vm-001
Finding.Description: VM 'prod-vm-001' OS disk does not have Azure Disk Encryption (ADE). Data at rest is unprotected.
Finding.Recommendation: Enable ADE using Azure Key Vault.

Finding.CheckName: NSG Exposes SSH(22) to Internet: mgmt-nsg
Finding.Description: NSG 'mgmt-nsg' allows SSH port 22 from Internet. Brute-force target.
Finding.Recommendation: Restrict SSH to known IP ranges or use Azure Bastion.

Finding.CheckName: NSG Exposes RDP(3389) to Internet: mgmt-nsg
Finding.Description: NSG 'mgmt-nsg' allows RDP port 3389 from Internet. Major attack vector.
Finding.Recommendation: Close RDP or restrict to known IPs. Use Azure Bastion instead.

Finding.CheckName: Key Vault Soft Delete Disabled: prod-keyvault
Finding.Description: Key Vault 'prod-keyvault' has no soft delete. Deleted secrets are unrecoverable.
Finding.Recommendation: Enable soft delete with 90-day retention.

Finding.CheckName: Key Vault Purge Protection Disabled: app-keyvault
Finding.Description: Key Vault 'app-keyvault' can be permanently purged. No recovery possible.
Finding.Recommendation: Enable purge protection.

Finding.CheckName: Key Vault All Permissions Granted: secrets-vault
Finding.Description: Key Vault 'secrets-vault' grants ALL permissions to a service principal.
Finding.Recommendation: Restrict access policies to minimum required permissions.

Finding.CheckName: SQL TDE Disabled: user-db
Finding.Description: Azure SQL database 'user-db' has Transparent Data Encryption disabled. Data at rest is unencrypted.
Finding.Recommendation: Enable TDE on the database.

Finding.CheckName: SQL Auditing Disabled: prod-sql-server
Finding.Description: SQL Server 'prod-sql-server' auditing is disabled. No database activity log.
Finding.Recommendation: Enable SQL Server Auditing with 90+ day retention.

Finding.CheckName: SQL Server Public Access Enabled: dev-sql-server
Finding.Description: SQL Server 'dev-sql-server' is accessible from public Internet.
Finding.Recommendation: Disable public network access. Use Private Endpoint.

Finding.CheckName: No Subscription Diagnostic Settings
Finding.Description: No diagnostic settings found. Admin operations not being logged.
Finding.Recommendation: Create diagnostic setting to export Activity Logs to Log Analytics.

Finding.CheckName: Too Many Subscription Owners
Finding.Description: 5 Owner role assignments found. CIS recommends max 3.
Finding.Recommendation: Reduce Owners to 2-3. Use PIM for JIT privileged access.

Finding.CheckName: Storage Minimum TLS Not 1.2: logstorage
Finding.Description: Storage account 'logstorage' minimum TLS is TLS1_0. Deprecated protocol.
Finding.Recommendation: Set minimumTlsVersion to TLS1_2.

Finding.CheckName: Storage Soft Delete Disabled: devstorageacct
Finding.Description: Blob soft delete disabled. Accidental deletions are unrecoverable.
Finding.Recommendation: Enable soft delete with 7-day retention.

Finding.CheckName: Storage Allows All Network Traffic: appstorageacct
Finding.Description: Network rules default to Allow. All IPs can reach the storage account.
Finding.Recommendation: Set defaultAction=Deny and whitelist specific VNets.

Finding.CheckName: VM Uses Unmanaged Disk: dev-vm-002
Finding.Description: VM 'dev-vm-002' uses unmanaged OS disk. Not covered by managed backup.
Finding.Recommendation: Migrate to Managed Disks.

Finding.CheckName: NSG Exposes MSSQL(1433) to Internet: db-nsg
Finding.Description: NSG 'db-nsg' exposes MSSQL port 1433 to Internet. Database at risk.
Finding.Recommendation: Move SQL to private subnet with no internet access.

Finding.CheckName: Key Vault Public Network Access: dev-keyvault
Finding.Description: Key Vault 'dev-keyvault' accessible from all networks. Attack surface exposed.
Finding.Recommendation: Restrict to VNet or use Private Endpoint.

Finding.CheckName: SQL Advanced Threat Protection Disabled: prod-sql-server
Finding.Description: Advanced Threat Protection not enabled. SQL injection attacks go undetected.
Finding.Recommendation: Enable Microsoft Defender for SQL.

Finding.CheckName: No Activity Log Alerts Configured
Finding.Description: No activity log alerts. Security-critical events trigger no notifications.
Finding.Recommendation: Create activity log alerts for NSG changes, policy assignments, etc.

Finding.CheckName: VM Boot Diagnostics Disabled: worker-vm-003
Finding.Description: Boot diagnostics disabled. VM startup issues cannot be diagnosed.
Finding.Recommendation: Enable boot diagnostics to a storage account.
